mapper.select: SELECT E.EMP_ID, E.DEPT_CD, E.EMP_PW, E.EMP_NM, E.EMP_BIR, E.EMP_PHONE, E.EMP_EML, E.EMP_DOMAIN_EML, E.EMP_ZIP, E.EMP_ADD1, E.EMP_ADD2, E.EMP_PROFILE, E.EMP_REGIST_DT, E.EMP_SIGN, E.EMP_LAST_DT, E.EMP_MLG, E.EMP_STTS, E.EMP_JBGD, E.EMP_ROLE, D.DEPT_NM,A.AVT_NO,A.AVT_SAVE_NM FROM EMPLOYEE E LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON (E.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD) LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP_AVT EA ON (E.EMP_ID = EA.EMP_ID AND EA.OWN_AVT_WEAR_YN = 'Y') LEFT OUTER JOIN AVATAR A ON (EA.AVT_NO = A.AVT_NO) WHERE E.EMP_ID = #{empId} AND E.EMP_STTS = 'Y'
SELECT * FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMP_ID LIKE '%'||#{query}||'%' OR EMP_NM LIKE '%'||#{query}||'%'

SELECT E.EMP_ID, E.DEPT_CD, E.EMP_PW, E.EMP_NM, E.EMP_BIR, E.EMP_PHONE, E.EMP_EML, E.EMP_DOMAIN_EML, E.EMP_ZIP, E.EMP_ADD1, E.EMP_ADD2, E.EMP_PROFILE, E.EMP_REGIST_DT, E.EMP_SIGN, E.EMP_LAST_DT, E.EMP_MLG, E.EMP_STTS, E.EMP_JBGD, E.EMP_ROLE, D.DEPT_NM, A.AVT_NO, A.AVT_SAVE_NM FROM EMPLOYEE E LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON (E.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD) LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP_AVT EA ON (E.EMP_ID = EA.EMP_ID AND EA.OWN_AVT_WEAR_YN = 'Y') LEFT OUTER JOIN AVATAR A ON (EA.AVT_NO = A.AVT_NO) WHERE E.EMP_EML = #{email}
SELECT * FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMP_ROLE != '관리자' AND EMP_STTS = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE EMPLOYEE SET DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId}
UPDATE EMPLOYEE SET EMP_JBGD = #{empJbgd}, EMP_ROLE = CASE WHEN #{empJbgd} = '팀장' THEN '팀장' WHEN #{empJbgd} != '팀장' THEN '사원' ELSE EMP_ROLE END WHERE DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} AND EMP_ID = #{empId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(EMP_ID), 26030000) + 1 FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMP_ID LIKE '2603%' AND LENGTH(TO_CHAR(EMP_ID)) = 8
INSERT INTO EMPLOYEE (EMP_ID, DEPT_CD, EMP_NM, EMP_DOMAIN_EML, EMP_PW, EMP_BIR,EMP_REGIST_DT,EMP_JBGD, EMP_ROLE, EMP_LVL,EMP_STTS) VALUES (#{empId}, #{deptCd}, #{empNm},#{empDomainEml}, #{empPw}, #{empBir}, SYSDATE, '사원', '사원', 4, 'Y')
mapper.select: SELECT A.EMP_ID, A.DEPT_CD, A.EMP_PW, A.EMP_NM, A.EMP_BIR, A.EMP_PHONE, A.EMP_EML, A.EMP_DOMAIN_EML , A.EMP_PROFILE, A.EMP_REGIST_DT, A.EMP_LAST_DT, A.EMP_STTS, A.EMP_JBGD, A.EMP_ROLE , B.DEPT_NM FROM EMPLOYEE A LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT B ON A.DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD WHERE EMP_ROLE != '관리자'

SELECT TO_CHAR(dt, 'YYYY') AS month, D.DEPT_NM AS name, SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'H' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS h, SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS f FROM ( SELECT EMP_REGIST_DT AS dt, DEPT_CD, 'H' AS type FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMP_REGIST_DT IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT EMP_LAST_DT dt, DEPT_CD, 'F' AS type FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMP_LAST_DT IS NOT NULL ) E JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD GROUP BY TO_CHAR(dt, 'YYYY'), D.DEPT_NM ORDER BY month, name
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND EMP_PHONE = #{empPhone}
mapper.update: UPDATE EMPLOYEE SET EMP_PW = #{empPw} WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(TMPR_PSWD_NO), 0) + 1 FROM TEMPORARY_PASSWORD
INSERT INTO TEMPORARY_PASSWORD (TMPR_PSWD_NO, EMP_ID, TMPR_PSWD, TMPR_PSWD_ISSU_DT, TMPR_PSWD_STTS) VALUES (#{tmprPswdNo}, #{empId}, #{tmprPswd}, SYSDATE, 'Y')
